title: Principal Frontend Developer at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Salesforce India Ventures Solutions in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Salesforce India Ventures Solutions:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India Ventures Solutions!
